testcase.name: test_progress_submission_success
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_classroom_batch3.py:144: in test_progress_submission_success assert res.status_code == 200, f"Progress submission failed: {res.text}" E AssertionError: Progress submission failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","session_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"surah_name":"Al-Fatihah","ayah_start":1,"ayah_end":7,"track_type":"Memorization (Hifz)","grading":{"fluency_score":8,"tajweed_score":7,"makhraj_score":9},"teacher_comments":"Good progress in memorization"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_progress_submission_student_forbidden

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 Forbidden for student, got 422 assert 422 == 403 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_classroom_batch3.py:169: in test_progress_submission_student_forbidden assert res.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403 Forbidden for student, got {res.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 403 Forbidden for student, got 422 E assert 422 == 403 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
